Surname.jp: 黒き提督・ヴェロニカ

name.jp: 断空コンビネーション

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Taunted</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>. Activates a <color=#28d9ed>Dual Attack</color> from the ally with the highest Attack if the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> is currently increased.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> 확률로 대상을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>도발</color>합니다. 자신이 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>이 증가한 상태라면 가장 공격력이 높은 아군의 <color=#28d9ed>협공</color>을 발생시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>の確率で対象を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間<color=#28d9ed>挑発</color>する。自分の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>がUPした状態の場合、攻撃力が最も高い味方単体に<color=#28d9ed>連携</color>を発生させる。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>挑衅</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。若自身<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>处于提升状态,则使攻击力最高的友军发动<color=#28d9ed>夹攻</color>。

name.jp: インペリアルランパート

description.en: (Passive Effect) Removes <color=#28d9ed>2</color> <color=#28d9ed>debuff(s)</color> from the caster at the start of the turn. Grants a <color=#28d9ed>Barrier</color> to the ally with the lowest Health for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>. The Barrier strength increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Max Health</color>.
description.kr: (패시브 효과) 턴 시작 시 자신에게 걸려 있는 <color=#28d9ed>약화 효과</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>2</color>개 제거합니다. 이후 체력 상황이 가장 나쁜 아군에게 <color=#28d9ed>실드</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 부여합니다. 실드량은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>최대 체력</color>이 높을수록 증가합니다.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)ターン開始時、自分の<color=#28d9ed>弱体効果</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2個</color>解除する。その後、残りHPが最も低い味方単体に<color=#28d9ed>シールド</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。自分の<color=#28d9ed>最大HP</color>が高いほどシールド量がUPする。
description.zh: (被动效果)在回合开始时,解除自身附带的<color=#28d9ed>2</color>个<color=#28d9ed>弱化效果</color>。此后使生命值最低的友军获得<color=#28d9ed>护盾</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。自身的<color=#28d9ed>生命值上限</color>越高,则护盾量越高。

name.jp: エンデュアランス・キャノン

description.en:
Attacks all enemies.
Grants increased <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> to all allies for <color=#28d9ed>3 turn(s)</color> and removes <color=#28d9ed>1</color> <color=#28d9ed>buff(s)</color> from the target.

Greatly increased <color=#28d9ed>damage dealt</color> if granted increased Attack.
description.kr:
적 전체를 공격합니다.
아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color> 동안 증가시키고, 공격 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>강화 효과</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>1</color>개 제거합니다.

공격력 증가 효과를 보유하고 있으면 <color=#28d9ed>피해량</color>이 대폭 증가 합니다.
description.jp:
敵全体にダメージを与える。
味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>の間UPさせ、対象の<color=#28d9ed>強化効果</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1</color>個解除する。

自分の攻撃力がUPした状態の場合、与える<color=#28d9ed>ダメージ</color>が大幅にUPする。
description.zh:
攻击全体敌人。
使全体友军的<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>3回合</color>,并解除攻击目标的<color=#28d9ed>1</color>个<color=#28d9ed>强化效果</color>。

若附带攻击力提升效果,则使<color=#28d9ed>伤害量</color>大幅提升。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nWhen an ally remains alive, reduces <color=#28d9ed>Weakness Gauge damage</color> by <color=#28d9ed>50%</color>.
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n아군 생존 시 받는 <color=#28d9ed>WG 피해</color>가 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 감소합니다.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n戦場に味方がいる場合、受ける<color=#28d9ed>WGダメージ</color>が<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>DOWNする。
description.zh: (被动效果)\n使友军存活时受到的<color=#28d9ed>WG伤害</color>降低<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>。

description.en: Becomes <color=#28d9ed>Enraged</color> when Health drops to <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> of Max Health or lower, and attacks all enemies. Then <color=#28d9ed>maximally increases</color> the <color=#28d9ed>cooldown</color> of <color=#28d9ed>Endurance Cannon</color>.\nAdditionally, grants permanent irremovable <color=#28d9ed>Counterattack</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Increased Attack</color> to all allies, but inflicts <color=#28d9ed>Reduced Speed</color> on the caster.
description.kr: 최대 체력의 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 이하가 되면 <color=#28d9ed>광폭화</color> 상태로 전환하고, 전체 대상을 공격합니다. 이 후, <color=#28d9ed>인듀어런스 캐논</color>의 <color=#28d9ed>쿨타임</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>최대로 증가</color> 시킵니다.\n추가로 아군 전체에게 영구적이고 해제 불가능한 <color=#28d9ed>반격, 공격력 증가</color> 효과를 부여하고 자신은 <color=#28d9ed>속도 감소</color> 효과를 추가로 얻게 됩니다.
description.jp: 最大HPの<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>以下になると<color=#28d9ed>【狂暴化】</color>状態に切り替わり、敵全体にダメージを与える。その後、<color=#28d9ed>【エンデュアランス・キャノン】</color>の<color=#28d9ed>スキルターン</color>を<color=#28d9ed>最大に増加</color>させる。\nまた、味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を永続的にUPさせ、味方全体に<color=#28d9ed>反撃</color>を永続的に付与する。自分の<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>がDOWNする。
description.zh: 若生命值降至上限的<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>以下,则转换为<color=#28d9ed>狂暴化</color>状态,并攻击全体目标。此后,增加<color=#28d9ed>持久加农炮</color>的<color=#28d9ed>冷却时间</color><color=#28d9ed>上限</color>。\n额外使友军获得无法解除的<color=#28d9ed>反击、攻击力提升</color>效果,并使自身额外获得<color=#28d9ed>速度降低</color>效果。
